nasb.text: You shall take the garments, and put on Aaron the tunic and the robe of the ephod and the ephod and the breastpiece, and gird him with the skillfully woven band of the ephod;

esv.text: Then you shall take the garments, and put on Aaron the coat and the robe of the ephod, and the ephod, and the breastpiece, and gird him with the skillfully woven band of the ephod.

cnv.text: 你要拿衣服來，給亞倫穿上雜色內袍、以弗得的長外袍、以弗得和胸牌，又束上巧工織成的以弗得的帶子。

ccb.text: 然后给亚伦穿上内袍、以弗得和以弗得的外袍，戴上胸牌，束上精致的以弗得带子，
